services.name: AudioEndpointBuilder
services.description: Manages audio devices for the Windows Audio service.

services.name: BFE
services.description: Manages firewall and IPsec policies and starts the user-mode policy enforcement framework.

services.name: BITS
services.description: Transfers files in the background using idle network bandwidth.

services.name: CryptSvc
services.description: Provides three management services: Catalog Database Service, Protected Root Service, and Automatic Root Certificate Update Service.

services.name: DcomLaunch
services.description: Provides launch functionality for DCOM infrastructure.

services.name: Dhcp
services.description: Registers and updates IP addresses and DNS records for this computer.

services.name: DiagTrack
services.description: Enables features that support in-application and connected user experiences.

services.name: Dnscache
services.description: Resolves and caches Domain Name System (DNS) names for this computer.

services.name: DPS
services.description: Enables problem detection, troubleshooting and resolution for Windows components.

services.name: EventLog
services.description: Manages events and event logs.

services.name: FontCache
services.description: Optimizes performance of applications by caching commonly used font data.

services.name: LanmanServer
services.description: Supports file, print, and named-pipe sharing over the network for this computer.

services.name: LanmanWorkstation
services.description: Creates and maintains client network connections to remote servers using the SMB protocol.

services.name: lmhosts
services.description: Provides support for the NetBIOS over TCP/IP (NetBT) service.

services.name: LSM
services.description: Core Windows Service that manages local user sessions.

services.name: MpsSvc
services.description: Windows Defender Firewall helps protect your computer by preventing unauthorized users from gaining access.

services.name: NlaSvc
services.description: Collects and stores configuration information for the network and notifies programs when this information is modified.

services.name: nsi
services.description: This service delivers network notifications to user-mode clients.

services.name: PlugPlay
services.description: Enables a computer to recognize and adapt to hardware changes with little or no user input.

services.name: Power
services.description: Manages power policy and power policy notification delivery.

services.name: ProfSvc
services.description: Responsible for loading and unloading user profiles.

services.name: RpcSs
services.description: Serves as the endpoint mapper and COM Service Control Manager.

services.name: SamSs
services.description: Stores security information for local user accounts.

services.name: Schedule
services.description: Enables a user to configure and schedule automated tasks on this computer.

services.name: SENS
services.description: Monitors system events and notifies subscribers to COM+ Event System of these events.

services.name: Spooler
services.description: Loads files to memory for later printing.

services.name: SystemEventsBroker
services.description: Coordinates execution of background work for WinRT application.

services.name: Themes
services.description: Provides user experience theme management.

services.name: UserManager
services.description: User Manager provides the runtime components required for multi-user interaction.

services.name: W32Time
services.description: Maintains date and time synchronization on all clients and servers in the network.

services.name: WinDefend
services.description: Helps protect users from malware and other potentially unwanted software.

services.name: Winmgmt
services.description: Provides a common interface and object model to access management information about operating system, devices, applications and services.

services.name: WlanSvc
services.description: Provides the logic required to configure, discover, connect to, and disconnect from a wireless local area network (WLAN).

services.name: WpnService
services.description: This service runs in session 0 and hosts the notification platform and connection provider.

services.name: wscsvc
services.description: Monitors and reports security health settings on the computer.

services.name: WSearch
services.description: Provides content indexing, property caching, and search results for files, e-mail, and other content.

services.name: wuauserv
services.description: Enables the detection, download, and installation of updates for Windows and other programs.
